name: The bridge to Caras Galadon
description:
You are now almost at the gates of Caras Galadon.  Many have sought to find
this mystical place, and many have failed.  As you look northward towards the
gates, you see for the first time why so many have tried.  The walls of the
city seem almost to shimmer, and dazzle your eyes with their pure white color.
The water is the dirtiest you have ever seen, as it roars underneath this
beautiful structure.  That many branches and debris are being swept along with
the current.  Such a thing to this wonderful place.  You sigh, and watch the
muddy water lick at the base of the walls.
